title: Basic Principles of Hedging: A company plans to hedge its exposure to currency fluctuations...
summary: Distinguish futures from forward contracts based on standardization and exchange trading.
prompt: A company plans to hedge its exposure to currency fluctuations by buying a forward contract. What risk does it eliminate?

options.text: By buying a forward contract, the company locks in the exchange rate
A futures contract traded on an exchange

solution: By buying a forward contract, the company locks in the exchange rate, thereby eliminating the risk of adverse price movements in the currency exchange rate.
